name: Manison #06
description: Al-Hana, 'The Brand Mark,' represents Jupiter's authority to mark, claim, and conquer what is rightfully due. The 'brand' refers to both the mark placed on livestock and the spiritual seal placed on endeavors blessed by divine will. Associated with the concept of fatah (divine opening or victory), where Jupiter's expansive power creates breakthroughs. The artwork depicts the Feet of Gemini with Gamma Geminorum (Alhena) blazing in Jupiter's royal blue-gold palette with victorious geometric patterns.

attributes.value: Hunting, besieging enemies, overcoming obstacles, gaining victories
